summary: This document is a structured interview guide designed for conducting research with Healthcare Professionals working with seniors. It outlines specific questions regarding their motivations, daily activities, challenges, and effective practices in elderly care. The content details the research objectives and methodology used to validate problem spaces for the AI phone agent product.
